text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I made some of my special miso soup, and you
just gotta try it!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Oh, El! Mmm, what an excellent present! I will
accept your kind offer!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
But first, I need to know—how much passion did
you put into this miso soup of yours?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Is chock-full of spicy miso! I call it, Fiery Passion
Miso Soup!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Mmm... very goooood! I'd expect nothing less, El!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Your gift promises to show me the cutting edge
of miso soup—a new horizon filled with countless
possibilities! I can't wait to dig in!
